results.title: Bankers told to ensure timely approval of loans under welfare schemes
results.description: Ranga Reddy DCC meeting discusses simplifying loan-sanctioning process, removing bottlenecks in credit disbursement and expediting assistance to eligible beneficiaries

results.title: Nancy Guthrie update: Ransom notes ‘not real’ - veteran criminal profiler drops bombshell; sparks ‘cover up’ allegations
results.description: Veteran criminal profiler John Kelly told Fox News that he did not believe the ransom notes in the Nancy Guthrie kidnapping case were ‘real’.
